title: cirsium tenoreanum
intro: Cirsium tenoreanum, also known as Spanish needle thistle or needle thistle, is a species of flowering plant in the thistle family (Asteraceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help in treating skin conditions, wounds, and infections. The health benefits of Cirsium tenoreanum include its ability to reduce swelling, ease pain, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into infusions, tinctures, or salves, and are often used topically to treat various skin issues and injuries.
